TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_pababelbelan_nu_ciyasan_a_kawaw, title = pababelbelan_nu_ciyasan_a_kawaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/pababelbelan_nu_ciyasan_a_kawaw} }

S.FORM: pababelbelan nu ciyasan a kawaw (Hulam a sulit: šĹ≥ŚĪĪŚüļŚúįšļčšĽ∂) 1984 a mihcaan, patizen ku syifu i Katangka a niyazu' tu kaitizaan nu hitay atu babelbel, paangic miala nai niling katukuh nanaling a lala' nu Katangka, atu ÁßÄśěóťĄČŚ§ßŚĪĪśĚĎ, sisa wini tusaay niyazu' Katangka a "ciya" atu Ś§ßŚĪĪśĚĎ a "san", "ciyasan" han kiza pababelbelan i tiza. sapisebeng tu kanatal, wini a dada' ku i buhangay. nu buyu' a pababelbelan, 3800 ku ditek nu takalaw nu buyu' malusaading ku buyu', kapahay a pikiadingan. nika makayza i lalangawan nu binacadan, sakala'cus nu laylay nu Sakizaya. ŚĹĪťüŅ ayaw nu 19 seci, saicelangay ku Sakizaya a binacadan i enal nu Kilay, nazikuzan kalalais i Kaliwan, masazuma tu ku pikawanan tu kawaw nu niyazu', nau satabakiay a niyazu' nu Sakizaya ku Takubuan mademec nu Hulam, namalupisak tu ku tademaw palecapuen henay nu Hulam i baluhay a niyazu', sipangangan han tu Sakul, uzuma satu a tademaw malimad tatimul taamis ku culil siniyazu' i Ciwidian, Cilakayan; katuuday a tademaw lihiza satu i Pangpangcahan. niyazu nu Katanka malukakitizaan tu nu pababelbelan nu hitay, paangican nu Cenfu miala palawpes ku niyazu', mahiza u nisupetu'an ku tademaw nu Katanka a tademaw miliyas tu kabalakian a niyazu', maduka ku balucu' nu Sakizaya, tizaay a Sakizaya caay ku mamalawpes ku duka nu balucu'.
S.PHON: pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan nu ¶ijasan a kawaw (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: ******) **** a mińß ¶aan, patiz…ôn ku sjifu i kataŇčka a nijazu Ē~ ° tu kaitizaan nu ńßitaj atu bab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ, paaŇči ¶ miar~…ĺa nai nir~…ĺiŇč katukuńß nanar~…ĺiŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kataŇčka, atu ******, sisa wini tusaaj nijazu Ē~ ° kataŇčka a " ¶ija" atu *** a "san", " ¶ijasan" ńßan kiza pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan i tiza. sapis…ôb…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ, wini a dada Ē~ ° ku i buńßaŇčaj. nu buju Ē~ ° a pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan, **** ku dit…ôk nu takar~…ĺaw nu buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺusaadiŇč ku buju Ē~ °, kapańßaj a pikiadiŇčan. nika makajza i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu bina ¶adan, sakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu sakizaja. ** ajaw nu ** s…ô ¶i, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ku sakizaja a bina ¶adan i …ônar~…ĺ nu kir~…ĺaj, nazikuzan kar~…ĺar~…ĺais i kar~…ĺiwan, masazuma tu ku pikawanan tu kawaw nu nijazu Ē~ °, nau satabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja ku takubuan mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ńßur~…ĺam, namar~…ĺupisak tu ku tad…ômaw par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu…ôn ńß…ônaj nu ńßur~…ĺam i bar~…ĺuńßaj a nijazu Ē~ °, sipaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sakur~…ĺ, uzuma satu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimad tatimur~…ĺ taamis ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sinijazu Ē~ ° i ¶iwidian, ¶ir~…ĺakajan; katuudaj a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßiza satu i paŇčpaŇč ¶ańßan. nijazu nu katanka mar~…ĺukakitizaan tu nu pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan nu ńßitaj, paaŇči ¶an nu ¶…ônfu miar~…ĺa par~…ĺawp…ôs ku nijazu Ē~ °, mańßiza u nisup…ôtu Ē~ °an ku tad…ômaw nu katanka a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺijas tu kabar~…ĺakian a nijazu Ē~ °, maduka ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu sakizaja, tizaaj a sakizaja ¶aaj ku mamar~…ĺawp…ôs ku duka nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °.
S.FORM: pababelbelan nu ciyasan a kawaw (Hulam a sulit: šĹ≥ŚĪĪŚüļŚúįšļčšĽ∂) 1984 a mihcaan, patizen ku syifu i Katangka a niyazu' tu kaitizaan nu hitay atu babelbel, paangic miala nai niling katukuh nanaling a lala' nu Katangka, atu ÁßÄśěóťĄČŚ§ßŚĪĪśĚĎ, sisa wini tusaay niyazu' Katangka a "ciya" atu Ś§ßŚĪĪśĚĎ a "san", "ciyasan" han kiza pababelbelan i tiza. sapisebeng tu kanatal, wini a dada' ku i buhangay. nu buyu' a pababelbelan, 3800 ku ditek nu takalaw nu buyu' malusaading ku buyu', kapahay a pikiadingan. nika makayza i lalangawan nu binacadan, sakala'cus nu laylay nu Sakizaya. ŚĹĪťüŅ ayaw nu 19 seci, saicelangay ku Sakizaya a binacadan i enal nu Kilay, nazikuzan kalalais i Kaliwan, masazuma tu ku pikawanan tu kawaw nu niyazu', nau satabakiay a niyazu' nu Sakizaya ku Takubuan mademec nu Hulam, namalupisak tu ku tademaw palecapuen henay nu Hulam i baluhay a niyazu', sipangangan han tu Sakul, uzuma satu a tademaw malimad tatimul taamis ku culil siniyazu' i Ciwidian, Cilakayan; katuuday a tademaw lihiza satu i Pangpangcahan. niyazu nu Katanka malukakitizaan tu nu pababelbelan nu hitay, paangican nu Cenfu miala palawpes ku niyazu', mahiza u nisupetu'an ku tademaw nu Katanka a tademaw miliyas tu kabalakian a niyazu', maduka ku balucu' nu Sakizaya, tizaay a Sakizaya caay ku mamalawpes ku duka nu balucu'.
S.PHON: pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan nu ¶ijasan a kawaw (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: ******) **** a mińß ¶aan, patiz…ôn ku sjifu i kataŇčka a nijazu Ē~ ° tu kaitizaan nu ńßitaj atu bab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ, paaŇči ¶ miar~…ĺa nai nir~…ĺiŇč katukuńß nanar~…ĺiŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kataŇčka, atu ******, sisa wini tusaaj nijazu Ē~ ° kataŇčka a " ¶ija" atu *** a "san", " ¶ijasan" ńßan kiza pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan i tiza. sapis…ôb…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ, wini a dada Ē~ ° ku i buńßaŇčaj. nu buju Ē~ ° a pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan, **** ku dit…ôk nu takar~…ĺaw nu buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺusaadiŇč ku buju Ē~ °, kapańßaj a pikiadiŇčan. nika makajza i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu bina ¶adan, sakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu sakizaja. ** ajaw nu ** s…ô ¶i, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ku sakizaja a bina ¶adan i …ônar~…ĺ nu kir~…ĺaj, nazikuzan kar~…ĺar~…ĺais i kar~…ĺiwan, masazuma tu ku pikawanan tu kawaw nu nijazu Ē~ °, nau satabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja ku takubuan mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ńßur~…ĺam, namar~…ĺupisak tu ku tad…ômaw par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu…ôn ńß…ônaj nu ńßur~…ĺam i bar~…ĺuńßaj a nijazu Ē~ °, sipaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sakur~…ĺ, uzuma satu a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺimad tatimur~…ĺ taamis ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sinijazu Ē~ ° i ¶iwidian, ¶ir~…ĺakajan; katuudaj a tad…ômaw r~…ĺińßiza satu i paŇčpaŇč ¶ańßan. nijazu nu katanka mar~…ĺukakitizaan tu nu pabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan nu ńßitaj, paaŇči ¶an nu ¶…ônfu miar~…ĺa par~…ĺawp…ôs ku nijazu Ē~ °, mańßiza u nisup…ôtu Ē~ °an ku tad…ômaw nu katanka a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺijas tu kabar~…ĺakian a nijazu Ē~ °, maduka ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu sakizaja, tizaaj a sakizaja ¶aaj ku mamar~…ĺawp…ôs ku duka nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °.
